𝗥𝗘𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗘-𝗦𝗬𝗡𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗗 | Detecting and removing invisible AI watermarks embedded in images by Google's SynthID system.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Detecting and removing invisible AI watermarks embedded in images by Google's SynthID system.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reverse-engineering SynthID watermark
✅ Spectral analysis for detection and removal
✅ Resolution-dependent carrier frequency discovery
✅ 90% accurate watermark detector
✅ Multi-resolution spectral bypass (V3)
✅ Achieves 75% carrier energy drop and 91% phase coherence drop
✅ 43+ dB PSNR on bypass


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 518 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 39 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository reverse-engineers Google's SynthID AI watermarking system using signal processing and spectral analysis. It discovers the watermark's structure, builds a detector with 90% accuracy, and develops a multi-resolution spectral bypass to surgically remove the watermark.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/aloshdenny/reverse-SynthID

𝗗𝗘𝗩𝗘𝗟𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗥-𝗜𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗦 | To provide developers and designers with a readily available and easily integrable set of technology logos for use in websites, applications, and design projects.  🔥 Super Hot!

This repository provides a collection of well-optimized SVG logos for various technologies, designed for developers and designers. The icons are customizable, scalable, and available as an npm package, making them easy to integrate into projects.

𝗟𝗜𝗩𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗘 | To serve as a client-centric data layer for applications, enabling offline-first capabilities and real-time data synchronization.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To serve as a client-centric data layer for applications, enabling offline-first capabilities and real-time data synchronization.
📅 Created: Sep 2023 • Updated: Apr 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reactive query layer with full SQLite support
✅ Adapters for web, mobile, server/edge, desktop
✅ Flexible data modeling and schema management
✅ True offline-first workflows
✅ Custom merge conflict resolution
✅ Sync with supported providers or custom solutions


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 127 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LiveStore is a next-generation state management framework that provides a powerful, client-centric data foundation for applications. It leverages reactive SQLite and a built-in sync engine to enable true offline-first workflows with custom merge conflict resolution and adapters for various platforms.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✅ Programmatic interaction with WhatsApp features
✅ Message sending and receiving
✅ Contact management

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Baileys is a TypeScript library for interacting with the WhatsApp Web API using WebSockets. It allows developers to build applications that can send and receive messages, manage contacts, and interact with WhatsApp features programmatically.
